meta.title: AI Automation, System Integration & Workflow Automation Services | Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Explore Amphibian Labs services: AI-powered data extraction, workflow automation, Microsoft 365 and SharePoint integration, API middleware, client portals, CRM cleanup, and vendor advisory for Australian SMBs.

hero.title: What can we build together?
hero.subtitle: We enhance your existing business systems with AI, automation, and integration. Every engagement starts with understanding the workflow and ends with clear ownership.

understand.title: Understand
understand.subtitle: Consultancy and business analysis
understand.description: Before building anything, we map the workflow, systems, constraints, risks, and business goal. This avoids expensive technical theatre and creates a clean path from problem to solution.

build.title: Build
build.subtitle: Engineering and delivery
build.description: We build the agreed system: automation, integration, backend service, portal, data pipeline, or AI extraction engine. Delivery is iterative, testable, and documented.

share.title: Share
share.subtitle: Open source and community
share.description: We publish tools, templates, blueprints, and technical notes where they can help others. Our open-source work reflects the same engineering principle we bring to clients: useful beats shiny.

automation.title: Workflow automation
automation.excerpt: Eliminate repetitive tasks across Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Teams, CRMs, spreadsheets, email, and third-party tools using Power Automate, Make, n8n, and custom scripts.

integration.title: System integration
integration.excerpt: Connect tools that were never designed to work together using API integrations, middleware, data sync, and event-driven workflows.

ai-extraction.title: AI-powered data extraction
ai-extraction.excerpt: Turn PDFs, scanned documents, invoices, reports, forms, and clinical documents into structured data using OCR, NLP, validation rules, and confidence scoring.

web-solutions.title: Web solutions and portals
web-solutions.excerpt: Create client portals, internal dashboards, status trackers, and operational interfaces connected to your existing backend systems.

vendor-selection.title: Vendor selection and advisory
vendor-selection.excerpt: Compare SaaS products, open-source tools, automation platforms, and custom builds based on real requirements, total cost of ownership, and lock-in risk.

crm-cleanup.title: CRM cleanup and optimisation
crm-cleanup.excerpt: Audit, deduplicate, restructure, and automate CRM data so your team can trust reports, campaigns, follow-ups, and customer records again.

items.question: Do I need to replace my existing systems?
items.answer: No. Amphibian Labs is built around enhancement rather than replacement. If your existing tools still serve the business, we connect them, automate around them, or add an intelligent backend layer.

items.question: What industries do you work with?
items.answer: We work with Australian small and medium-sized businesses across healthcare, construction, trades, professional services, retail, and operations-heavy teams. The key factor is the workflow, not the industry label.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Discovery sessions take 2 hours. A scoped automation or integration project usually takes 2–6 weeks. Larger AI backend or portal projects may take 6–12 weeks depending on data quality, integrations, testing requirements, and deployment complexity.

items.question: Will I own the code you build?
items.answer: Yes. You receive documentation, handover, and source code where applicable. We avoid vendor lock-in and do not charge recurring licence fees for custom code we wrote.

items.question: What if I just need advice, not a build?
items.answer: That's what the Discover tier is for. We can map your workflow, compare options, and recommend the right path without forcing a build.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support after a project?
items.answer: Yes. The Evolve tier is designed for businesses that want a technical partner to maintain, extend, and improve their automations and integrations over time.

cta.title: Not sure which service fits?
cta.body: Book a discovery session. We'll map the problem and recommend the most practical path - even if that path is not us.
